name: Bankruptcy Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into 1-inch cubes.
2. Brown beef cubes over high heat in a nonstick skillet.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the skillet and cover.
4. Simmer for 1 hour over medium heat until the meat is tender.
8 servings
One serving = 345 calories, 3 low-fat protein + 1 starch + 1 vegetable exchange
23 grams protein, 22 grams carbohydrate, 12 grams fat, 482 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus, Betty Wedman (1993) Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier (Feb 94)
